fields.label: Brand Name
fields.description: Shown in the app header, emails, login page, and browser tab.

fields.label: Brand Logo
fields.description: Upload your logo. Displayed in the navbar and login page.

fields.label: Primary Color
fields.description: Accent color for buttons, active links, and highlights. Default: #E8630A

fields.label: Login Page Tagline
fields.description: Short text shown below the brand name on the login page.

fields.label: Email Footer Text
fields.description: Appears at the bottom of all system emails (password reset, notifications, etc.). Leave blank to use the brand name.

fields.label: Enable AI Features
fields.description: Enables anomaly detection, product matching, low-stock predictions, and stream summaries. Requires Ollama to be running.

fields.label: Ollama URL
fields.description: Ollama API base URL. Change only if Ollama runs on a remote host or non-default port.

fields.label: Ollama Model
fields.description: Model name for all AI tasks. Run 'ollama pull <model>' on the server to download. Recommended: llama3.1:8b (8 GB RAM) or llama3.1:70b (32 GB RAM).
